2393880.name: 幽霊屋敷　HAUNTED HOUSE
2393880.description:
"Haunted House" is a VR-only horror game set in Japan.
The player explores a dark Japanese mansion, escaping from various ghosts encountered along the way, and in some cases exterminating them.

There are buildings and accessories that are unique to Japan on the map, and I think you can feel the climate.

There are also various types of ghosts, from humanoid to ninja, samurai, and other Japanese ghosts.

It will be a horror game, but I think you can enjoy the world view of Japan, so I think you can enjoy a little travel feeling.
